base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemy_boss_galaga_idle — a character (boss) from 1981 galaga. Green/yellow Boss Galaga (top-tier enemy) — 2-frame wing-flap animation while in formation. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Green/yellow Boss Galaga (top-tier enemy) — 2-frame wing-flap animation while in formation; has 2 hit-points (green → blue one-shot-remaining); can deploy tractor-beam to capture player fighter
